sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62421" key="leontou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεοντοῦχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔχω</etym>) <sense id="n62421.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">holding a lion</tr_>, epith. of Asclepios at Ascalon, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Procl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
